sales.description:
Ancients
MYSIA. Pergamum. Roman Rule (ca. 133-67 BC). AR cistophorus (26mm, 12.57 gm, 1h). NGC MS 5/5 - 5/5. Ca. 98-95 BC. Serpent emerging from cista mystica; all within ivy wreath / Bow in bowcase ornamented with aphlaston, flanked by two serpents; MA above, ΠEPΓ civic monogram to left, serpent-entwined thyrsus to right. SNG France 5, 1722-1723. Reflective, citrine toning. 

Ex Stephen Album Rare Coins, Auction 47 (14 September 2023), lot 10.  www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice
